Profile

About

M.A. candidate in behavioral neuroscience with a strong computational focus. I build the software and analysis pipelines that power my lab’s experiments—from 3D virtual-reality navigation tasks to automated literature-monitoring systems.

My research explores spatial navigation, learning, and memory, with particular interest in how hippocampal place cells, theta oscillations, and cholinergic systems contribute to cognitive mapping. I am equally comfortable at the bench and at the terminal, writing production-grade Python, R, and C# alongside designing behavioral paradigms.

Research Software

Experimental Platforms

Data Pipeline
Python • SABV-Compliant • Multi-Paradigm

NIH SABV-Compliant Behavioral Data Pipeline

A comprehensive automated pipeline for rodent behavioral data enforcing NIH Sex As a Biological Variable (SABV) guidelines. Ingests raw outputs, applies safety filters, computes 100+ variables, and generates sex-stratified summaries and publication-ready visualizations across multiple paradigms.

  • Summary statistics across 31+ animals with per-sex breakdowns and significance tests
  • Distance-traveled histograms stratified by sex with inter-group comparison tables
  • “Animal vs Test by Sex” scatter plots with t-test stats and full data tables
  • Automated pipeline across MWM, OFOE, EPM, and SIRT behavioral paradigms
PythonpandasmatplotlibstatsmodelsNumPy
Data Science

Analysis & Visualization

Data Analysis
R • ggplot2 • Plotly • PCA

Behavioral Neuroscience Analysis Suite

A comprehensive R-based statistical pipeline for OFOE and EPM rodent behavioral experiments. Enforces SABV compliance automatically, discovers behavioral phenotypes via PCA, and produces interactive Plotly dashboards and publication-quality figures.

  • Automated sex-stratified analysis across 100+ behavioral variables
  • PCA-based phenotype discovery identifying “Scout” vs. “Guard” profiles
  • Interactive dashboards with per-subject hover tooltips and significance overlays
  • Cross-apparatus correlation analysis linking OFOE and EPM outcomes
Rggplot2PlotlyFactoMineRtidyverseRMarkdown
Data Competition
Python • scikit-learn • 3,000+ Counties

County Health Rankings Analysis

A data science project analyzing health insurance coverage vs. health outcomes across 3,000+ U.S. counties for the County Health Rankings & Roadmaps 2025 competition. Combines OLS regression, KMeans clustering, and policy-oriented dashboards.

  • OLS regression model (R² = 0.494) across 2,832 counties with 12+ predictors
  • KMeans clustering + PCA for county health-risk profiling
  • Double-burden identification: 75th+ percentile for both uninsured & unhealthy
  • Multi-panel dashboards for policy-oriented storytelling
Pythonscikit-learnstatsmodelsmatplotlibpandas
Software & Automation

Tools & Applications

Automation

PubMed Research Hub

A modular Python automation suite monitoring PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, and Grants.gov, delivering curated email digests. Features a Research Hub UI with multi-source querying (PubMed + Europe PMC + OpenAlex) and local LLM summarization via Ollama. Deployed on Azure Functions with daily scheduling and deduplication.

PythonAzure FnsOllamaBio.EntrezSMTP
Visualization

Behavioral Analysis Dashboards

Interactive multi-panel dashboards in R and Plotly for exploring OFOE sex-difference data. Displays significance rankings, effect-size distributions, and per-animal behavioral profiles. Designed for live exploration during lab meetings and seamless export of publication-ready panels.

RPlotlyggplot2Shiny
Full-Stack

Research File Organizer

A web-based file indexing system cataloging 36,000+ files with real-time search, filtering, and a Django backend. Supports papers, datasets, code, and multimedia. Includes an integrated Unity 3D visualization and Webpack-bundled frontend.

PythonDjangoJavaScriptWebpackC#/Unity
Engineering Design

3D Modeling & Fabrication

3D Design
Tinkercad • CAD • Prototyping

Tinkercad Engineering Designs

A collection of functional 3D models designed in Tinkercad for practical research and everyday use — from lab-focused engineering solutions to custom enclosures. Each model is designed with printability and real-world function in mind.

  • Cryo anti-roll device: stabilization mount for cryogenic sample vials
  • Custom server/book enclosure for organization and cable management
  • Iterative parametric design workflow in Tinkercad
  • All models designed for FDM 3D printing with standard PLA filament
TinkercadCAD3D PrintingFDM
